rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amounts. Educ. Code §37.008 governs disciplinary alternative education programs and contains no tax, appraisal, or homestead provisions. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: Each school district shall provide a disciplinary alternative education program that:
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no conflict identified.
